name: Peanut Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the peanut butter, egg, sugar and vanilla until well blended.
2. Quickly stir in the cereal.
3. Roll into 1 inch balls. Place on a cookie sheet.
4. Flatten each ball with tines of a fork.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, or until slightly cooled. Do not remove from the pan until done.
